steps.action: Open / in isolated session after clearing cookies/localStorage/IndexedDB
steps.expected: First-time Welcome renders in clean state
steps.observed: Welcome rendered at / with New Keyset, Import Device Profile, and Onboard actions
Navigated to /import with Load Backup heading, backup input, upload, and Continue button

steps.action: Enter backup string bfprofile1-import-validation-sample and continue
steps.observed: Navigated to /import/decrypt with loaded backup display and Backup Password input

steps.action: Enter backup password and click Decrypt Backup
steps.observed: Navigated to /import/review with Group Profile and Device Profile cards

steps.action: Enter local profile password + confirm and click Import & Launch Signer
steps.expected: Reach final destination (Dashboard or Welcome with profile saved)
steps.observed: Navigated to / and returning-user Welcome showed imported profile row: My Signing Key (2/3) with Unlock control

steps.expected: Imported profile data matches backup-derived review data
steps.observed: Group name/threshold shown during review (My Signing Key, 2 of 3) matched final saved profile row label on Welcome

evidence.network: No requests captured (welcome-entry/import-completion/VAL-CROSS-003-network-requests.txt); flow transitions were client-side

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-003): pass. Import flow progressed Welcome -> Load Backup -> Decrypt Backup -> Review & Save -> Welcome with imported profile persisted and visible.
